title: Realistic Lanterns
description: Lanterns that burn out after a while, and compatible with any lantern mods!
body:
# 🔥Realistic Lanterns

A mod of my [Easycraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/easycraftofficial) modpack <3

- Lanterns burn out after a certain time
- Unlit Lanterns can be relit with Flint And Steel and Torches
  
![gif](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMWMyaXZoNjk1MTgzYnNwMmM1bnM1cTM1YWluMXhmczR3ZXZ6M2c3aCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/WSu1eQl7WS129SXocZ/giphy.gif)

realistic_lanters.json config
```json
{
  "lanternBurnOutTime": 48000
}
```
